features: LYNX Gold Deodorant Body Spray keeps you cool and confident no matter what with oud wood & dark vanilla scent
This LYNX men's deodorant spray with new dual-action odour-busting zinc technology gives you 48 hours of odour protection, keeping you smelling 100% awesome and feeling chill, all day
Be ready for any kinds of adventure, LYNX Gold Deodorant Bodyspray has got you covered with its 48-hour high-definition scent – you’ll smell irresistible, even when you sweat
This aerosol bodyspray has the same irresistible LYNX Gold fragrance with a fresh new look
Embrace the refreshing sensation of this LYNX deodorant with its intriguing fragrance – welcome to the future, it smells amazing
This great smelling LYNX deodorant spray comes in an infinitely recyclable can – fresher you, cleaner planet
description: Product Description Award yourself gold for smelling the freshest you can. You never know what's around the corner. Or who. LYNX Gold Body Spray gives you 48 hours of odour protection with our revolutionary dual-action odour-busting zinc technology, keeping you smelling awesome and feeling chill, all day. You never know when opportunity will strike, so you need a bodyspray that’s going to keep you smelling iconic and feeling fresh all day, every day. With its 48-hour high-definition scent, LYNX Gold Deodorant Aerosol Body Spray has got you covered. Experience this warming fragrance that keeps you smelling iconic and feeling fresh. All. Day. Long. Same classic LYNX Gold scent, fresh new look. But we know what’s on the inside matters too. Our revolutionary new dual-action technology fights odour-causing bacteria so you can avoid odour and smell irresistible for 48 hours. All day, all night – no matter what, you’re ready to go for gold. How to use it? Shake, twist and spray that icy freshness across your chest. Smell irresistible. This great smelling LYNX men's deodorant spray comes in an infinitely recyclable can – fresher you, cleaner planet. By 2025, LYNX aims for all our packaging to be recyclable or to include recycled materials. Welcome to the future. It smells amazing. LYNX. Directions Shake, twist and spray the alluring freshness over your chest. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
